stages.description: Source material identified (OEM PDF, image, web), no semantic interpretation yet.
Raw content extracted from source (text, structure, references).
Content obtained via OCR; explicitly flagged for confidence review.
Semantic shape inferred from extracted/OCR content; not yet normalized.
Conformed to ontology vocabulary, id format, and shared terminology.
Single authoritative representation chosen across duplicates/synonyms/bilingual variants.
Reviewed by human/OEM checkpoint; lineage and evidence cross-validated.
Granted operational authority; usable by retrieval, onboarding, troubleshooting models.
Marked for retirement; still readable; flagged not-for-new-use.
Replaced by a newer canonical artifact; lineage link to successor required.
Removed from active surfaces; retained for audit/lineage; never re-promoted.
Cannot progress without human/OEM input; tracked as knowledge debt.
